"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\feedback_analyzer.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\feedback_analyzer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\feedback_analyzer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\feedback_analyzer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o feedback_analyzer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libfeedback_analyzer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\feedback_analyzer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
